grant_and_term.grant: Non-exclusive license to use System at specified location under Brand
grant_and_term.term_new_construction: 23 years from Effective Date (to midnight last day of month)
grant_and_term.term_coo: Remaining term or as franchisor approves
grant_and_term.renewal: No right to renew or extend

fee_obligations.monthly_royalty: 5% of Gross Rooms Revenue by 15th of following month
fee_obligations.monthly_program_fee: 4% of GRR by 15th of following month (changeable)
fee_obligations.gross_rooms_revenue_definition: All revenues from sale/rental of guest rooms including loyalty redemptions, mandatory guest fees, late cancellation, no-show revenue; excludes Gross Receipts Tax and guest room rebates
fee_obligations.other_fees: Per Item 6 fee table — extensive technology, distribution, compliance fees
fee_obligations.tax_reimbursement: Must reimburse franchisor for any Gross Receipts Tax imposed on franchisor
fee_obligations.business_interruption_insurance: Must maintain; must assign claims for fee amounts during interruption

site_and_construction.construction_start: Within 16 months of approval (New Dev); per PIP (Conversion)
site_and_construction.construction_complete: Within 36 months of approval (New Dev); per PIP/FA (Conversion)
site_and_construction.automatic_extensions: 30-day rolling for New Dev/Conversion unless 60-day notice; not for COO/Re-licensing
site_and_construction.plans_approval: Must submit Plans and Designs to franchisor for approval before commencing work
site_and_construction.ada_compliance: Architect must certify compliance; franchisor may withhold opening approval if non-compliant
site_and_construction.renovation_cycles: FRCM program — periodic mandatory renovations at franchisee cost, no limit on frequency

management_and_operations.management_approval: Must hire management approved by franchisor; may require professional management company for first year
management_and_operations.gm_requirement: Must have qualified, experienced GM approved by franchisor
management_and_operations.independent_contractor: Franchisee is independent contractor and employer — franchisor does not control personnel
management_and_operations.gaming_prohibition: No gaming or casino operations in or connected to Hotel
management_and_operations.facility_sharing: No sharing with other lodging without express permission
management_and_operations.tic_prohibition: No tenant-in-common syndication without express permission

non_curable: 3 defaults in 12 months regardless of cure (§13.2.2)
Inability to pay debts / assignment for creditors (§13.2.3)
termination_triggers.interim_remedies: Suspension of reservation system, directory removal, reservation diversion, software disabling, financial accommodation revocation, intervention fees

transfer_restrictions.permitted_no_consent: Public equity, private <50% no control change, fund same manager
transfer_restrictions.permitted_with_consent: Affiliate ($5,500 fee), family/trust, death, private >50% changed
transfer_restrictions.coo_transfer: $150,000 fee, 60-day notice, new FA, PIP, all current requirements
transfer_restrictions.public_offering: $5,000 processing fee + costs; 60-day advance submission of materials
transfer_restrictions.mortgage_pledge: Permitted without consent for hotel acquisition/development financing; all others require consent

noncompete.during_term: May not own or license competing brand. May be franchisee or manager of competitor. May own minority interest under certain conditions.

dispute_resolution.venue: Eastern District of Virginia or Fairfax County VA; or New York. Franchisor may sue where hotel is.
dispute_resolution.governing_law: New York (without conflict of law principles)
dispute_resolution.waiver_of_jury: Not explicitly stated in reviewed sections

indemnification.scope: Franchisee must defend, indemnify, hold harmless franchisor, Hilton Worldwide, all subsidiaries, affiliates, officers, directors, employees, agents, successors, assigns
indemnification.trigger: Any claim, demand, tax, penalty, or proceeding arising from claimed occurrence at Hotel

insurance.requirement: Must maintain minimum levels and types specified in Manual

force_majeure.effect_on_construction: Excuses failure to complete if due to Force Majeure
force_majeure.effect_on_operations: 5-day cessation due to Force Majeure excuses non-curable default if reasonable steps taken
force_majeure.effect_on_casualty: Hotel closing after casualty — 18 months to repair and reopen

liquidated_damages.pre_opening_no_hotel_work: System's Average Monthly Royalty × 60 (if site used for competing hotel within 1 year)
liquidated_damages.pre_opening_after_work: System's Average Monthly Royalty × 60 (unless Force Majeure)
liquidated_damages.post_opening_first_2_years: Greater of: Hotel's Average Monthly Royalty × 60 OR $25,000 × approved Guest Rooms
liquidated_damages.last_60_months: Hotel's Average Monthly Royalty × months remaining
liquidated_damages.note: FA uses 'Termination Fee' language rather than 'Liquidated Damages' in some brand variants — confirm applicable provision for Curio

guaranty.scope: Joint and several, individual and collective
guaranty.obligations_guaranteed: All obligations under Franchise Agreement and related agreements
guaranty.indemnification: Guarantor must defend, protect, indemnify, hold harmless franchisor from all claims
guaranty.assignability: Franchisor may assign without affecting guarantor's liability
guaranty.binding: Binds guarantor's heirs, executors, administrators, successors, assigns
guaranty.representations: Power to execute, valid and binding obligation, anti-corruption compliance
guaranty.release_conditions: May request release if: (a) guarantor sells all equity interest, (b) replacement guarantor approved, (c) franchisee in good standing with no default in prior 24 months
distinctive_clauses: TIC ownership variant includes cross-indemnification between guarantors
Guarantor acknowledged opportunity to review with attorney before signing
